optional_kwargs.output_tensor: preallocated tensor of shape {DIM} (optional, enables in-place style write)

applicability_notes: Elementwise unary truncation toward zero. Golden is torch.trunc. Supports optional preallocated output_tensor and queue_id. Validated with ULP and PCC against bfloat16 full-range inputs on TILE_LAYOUT.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.trunc(input_tensor)
